register.title: Create account
register.successMessage: We sent a confirmation link to your email. Click the link to activate your account.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If the email exists in our system, you'll receive a link to reset your password.

welcome.heroDescription: This is not a test. You are helping our AI learn how you think to revolutionize vocational guidance.
welcome.multipleSectionsDesc: Complete them at your own pace. There are no right or wrong answers.
welcome.yourVoiceMattersDesc: We need to know how you feel at each step: if it bored you, if you liked it, if something was unclear. Be honest, that helps us improve.
welcome.feedbackButtonSubtitle: The most important thing of all
welcome.feedbackButtonDesc2: at the bottom right during the
welcome.feedbackButtonDesc3: . Tap it anytime to leave us a comment about what you are thinking or feeling.

feedbackExamples.confusingDetail: Tell us which part confused you
feedbackExamples.boringDetail: Tell us in which section and why
feedbackExamples.likedDetail: We want to know what you enjoyed

welcome.feedbackHonest: Your honest feedback is the most valuable thing for us. Truly.
welcome.singleSessionTitle: Recommendation: do it in one go
welcome.singleSessionDesc: Try to complete everything in a single session so that the data loads correctly.
welcome.singleSessionWarning: If you need to do it at different times, make sure to use the
welcome.singleSessionWarning3: that we will ask you again.
welcome.rewardDesc: For supporting us today, we give you
welcome.rewardDesc2: to the full platform when we launch.

personalData.title: Your information
personalData.subtitle: Fill in your details to get started

initialQuestion.title: How many careers do you have in mind?

careerInput.title: Which careers do you have in mind?
careerInput.subtitle: Write the options you are considering

q2Options.finished: I finished it (but don't want to practice)

careerChange.q3Title: Be honest, why did you enroll?

q3Options.likedIdea: I liked the idea I had of the career
q3Options.pressure: Family pressure / All my friends were going
q3Options.noIdea: I didn't know what to do and chose randomly

q4Options.content: The Content: The subjects bored me
q4Options.difficulty: The Difficulty: It was too hard / I couldn't understand
q4Options.future: The Future: I couldn't see myself working in that field
q4Options.environment: The Environment: I didn't fit in with the people or the place

careerChange.q5Title: What specific activity did you hate?
careerChange.q6Title: Was there anything you DID like?
careerChange.q7Title: For your next career, what's non-negotiable?

personaValidator.title: Which of these profiles do you identify with the most?
personaValidator.subtitle: Read each description carefully, expand it to see the details, and choose the one that best reflects your current situation.

categories.headerSubtitle: Complete the following sections to discover your vocational profile
categories.footerInfo: You can complete the sections in any order you prefer. Your progress is saved automatically.

mips.title: Personality and Styles
mips.subtitle: MIPS - MILLON
mips.description: Evaluate your way of being and relating to others.
mips.instruction: Read each statement and decide whether or not it describes your way of being.

riasec.title: Interests and Aptitudes
riasec.subtitle: RIASEC - HOLLAND
riasec.description: Vocational typologies: Realistic, Investigative, Artistic, Social, Enterprising, Conventional.
riasec.longTitle: II. Vocational Interests and Aptitudes (RIASEC - HOLLAND)
riasec.longSubtitle: John Holland's model. Typologies: Realistic (R), Investigative (I), Artistic (A), Social (S), Enterprising (E), Conventional (C).
riasec.instructionDetail: In each subsection, check the words or phrases you identify with.

herrmann.title: Brain Dominance
herrmann.subtitle: NED HERRMANN
herrmann.description: Identify your thinking style and creativity.
herrmann.longSubtitle: Herrmann Brain Dominance model (Creativity and thinking styles).
herrmann.instructionDetail: Answer with complete honesty, choosing the option you most identify with (not the "socially correct" one).

steps.motivacion: Check the 5 feelings or situations that make you feel most motivated at work
steps.aprendizaje: When I learn, I like to... (check 5 options)
steps.aprendizajeModo: I prefer to learn through... (check 5 options)
steps.tipoPregunta: What type of question do you most like to ask?
steps.meGusta: Mark what you like to do most (check 4)
steps.comprarChoice: Which situation do you prefer to answer about?
steps.comprarCoche: When buying a car, you... (check 5 statements)
steps.comprarCelular: When buying a phone, you... (check 5 statements)
steps.comportamiento: How do you define your behavior?
steps.desprecio: Dismissive phrases you have heard most often (check 5)
steps.resolucionProblema: When I have to solve a problem, I usually...
steps.visionProblema: When I have to solve a problem, I look for...
steps.frasesAproximadas: Which phrases most closely match what you say? (check 3)

gardner.title: Multiple Intelligences
gardner.subtitle: GARDNER
gardner.instructionDetail: Rate each item on the scale: 1-NEVER / 2-ALMOST NEVER / 3-SOMETIMES / 4-ALMOST ALWAYS / 5-ALWAYS.

proyectivas.title: Projective Techniques
proyectivas.subtitle: INCOMPLETE SENTENCES
proyectivas.description: Complete sentences to express your true feelings.
proyectivas.instruction: Complete the following sentences with the first thing that comes to mind. Try to express your true feelings.

autodescubrimiento.title: Self-Discovery
autodescubrimiento.subtitle: STYLES AND TALENTS
autodescubrimiento.description: Explore your interests, style, and talents.
autodescubrimiento.longSubtitle: Explore your interests, style, and talents
autodescubrimiento.selectTalents: Select the talents you recognize in yourself for this area:
autodescubrimiento.selectNoTalents: From the remaining ones, select those you do NOT excel at or are not interested in:
autodescubrimiento.allTalentsSelected: You selected all the talents in this area. There are no options to mark as "Not a Talent".
autodescubrimiento.autobiografiaIntro: Write your life story simply and honestly. The idea is not to write "perfectly", but to think about who you are, where you come from, and where you would like to go.

estiloVida.title: Lifestyle
estiloVida.subtitle: WORK PREFERENCES
estiloVida.description: Explore your interests, values, and work lifestyle preferences.
estiloVida.longSubtitle: Explore your preferences and work lifestyle
estiloVida.explainWhyDislike: Explain why you don't like it
estiloVida.markOptions: Check or highlight the options you identify with.
estiloVida.incompleteSections: Please complete all sections before saving.

visionFuturo.title: Vision and Future Projection
visionFuturo.subtitle: PROJECTION TOOLKIT
visionFuturo.description: Visualizations, fantasy workplace, and depth questions.
visionFuturo.longSubtitle: Explore your vision and future aspirations
visionFuturo.visualizacionesIntro: Imagine different moments in your future and describe how you would like them to be.
visionFuturo.lugarFantaseadoIntro: Describe the spaces where you feel comfortable and how you imagine your ideal workplace.
visionFuturo.preguntasProfundidadIntro: Answer these questions honestly. There are no right or wrong answers, it's about getting to know yourself better.
visionFuturo.incompleteSections: Please complete all sections before saving.

arbolGenealogico.title: Family Tree
arbolGenealogico.subtitle: FAMILY CONTEXT
arbolGenealogico.description: Record your family's education and occupations.
arbolGenealogico.longSubtitle: Fill in your family's details to better understand your vocational context
arbolGenealogico.name: Name
arbolGenealogico.studiesPlaceholder: E.g.: High school diploma, University degree, etc.
arbolGenealogico.incompleteParents: Please complete at least the basic information for your parents before saving.

universidad.title: University Selection
universidad.subtitle: DECISION FACTORS
universidad.description: Evaluate cost, location, admission, identity, and prioritize the most important factors for you.
universidad.incompleteBlocks: Please complete all blocks before saving.

feedback.panelSubtitle: Write the first thing that comes to mind
feedback.hintsTitle: The kind of things that help us:

hints.1: "This question confused me, I didn't know what to put"
hints.2: "This section felt long, I lost focus"
hints.3: "The options here don't represent me at all"
hints.4: "This part was great, it really made me think"
hints.5: "I didn't really understand what they were asking in question 3"
hints.6: "I think there should be more varied options here"

feedback.placeholder: What do you think about what you're doing right now?
feedback.errorSaving: Error saving comment. Please try again.

buscador.title: The Seeker
buscador.perfil: Is at a moment where the inner compass hasn't yet found a fixed north. Has more clarity about what they don't want than about their strengths, seeking to transform uncertainty into a concrete action plan.
buscador.busca: A solid starting point and external validation to organize the mental noise.
buscador.expectativa: Narrowed-down paths (quality over quantity) and references of people they can identify with to feel that it's possible to move forward.
buscador.estrategia: Simplify the panorama and make visible the capabilities they currently overlook.

multipotencial.title: The Multipotentialite
multipotencial.perfil: Feels that choosing a single path means "turning off" other vital facets of their identity. Their challenge is not a lack of options, but how to integrate diverse passions into a lifestyle that doesn't feel like a cage.
multipotencial.busca: A life architecture that allows combining activities (hybrids) or understanding a career as a base platform and not a final destination.
multipotencial.expectativa: A flexible ecosystem that includes parallel projects and serious hobbies, avoiding the feeling of a "dead-end road".
multipotencial.estrategia: Connect dots (interdisciplinarity) and show the versatility of the options.

analitico.title: The Analytical
analitico.perfil: Already has the general map defined, but pauses at the "fine print" before taking the final step. Needs to distinguish subtle nuances between options in the same field to ensure their choice fits perfectly with their day-to-day expectations.
analitico.busca: Technical depth and clear differentiation about daily work routine (Zoom In) to avoid future surprises.
analitico.expectativa: "Side by side" comparisons and objective data that disambiguate options that seem identical.
analitico.estrategia: Provide precision through lifestyle and work environment contrasts.

practico.title: The Practical / Self-taught
practico.perfil: Their abilities shine more in real execution and problem-solving than in traditional theoretical study. Feels the standard system doesn't always measure their true value, prioritizing action over memorization.
practico.busca: To value their real "skills" (digital, creative, or technical) and find dynamic educational formats.
practico.expectativa: Direct language, validation of their non-academic abilities, and proposals for modern paths or technical degrees.
practico.estrategia: Act as a "Scout" for hidden talents and dignify alternative paths.

determinado.title: The Determined
determinado.perfil: Has a very firm vision of their future, often built on a strong aspirational image or family references. Their journey requires validating whether that initial certainty holds up when confronted with the operational reality of the profession.
determinado.busca: To support their intuition with rational arguments and ensure their idealization matches practice.
determinado.expectativa: Confirmation of their choice, but will value data that allows them to defend their decision with authority.
determinado.estrategia: Accompany their certainty by offering a constructive "reality check" about daily routine.

enfocado.title: The Focused
enfocado.perfil: The vocational doubt has already been resolved; their mindset is entirely on excellence and performance. They don't seek to discover the "what", but to optimize the "where" and "how" to maximize their projection from day one.
enfocado.busca: Superior-level information, niche specializations, and academic quality guarantees.
enfocado.expectativa: Recognition of their profile and hard data on international projection or postgraduate studies.
enfocado.estrategia: Strategic career planning and detection of cutting-edge opportunities.

estratega.title: The Strategist
estratega.perfil: Evaluates higher education through the lens of profitability and return on investment. Prioritizes market intelligence and professional scalability, understanding a career as a tool to achieve financial autonomy.
estratega.busca: Hard market data, future trends, and risk/benefit analysis of their invested time.
estratega.expectativa: Executive information, salary rankings, and honesty about real labor demand.
estratega.estrategia: Advisory focused on intelligent management of professional capital and competitiveness.

reinventado.title: The Reinvented
reinventado.perfil: Prioritizes their well-being and seeks to align their career with their true essence after a previous experience that didn't fit.
reinventado.busca: A contrasting environment that activates their dormant strengths and understanding the causes of the previous disconnect.
reinventado.expectativa: To confirm that their previous journey is a transferable asset (competitive advantage) and not wasted time.
reinventado.estrategia: Ensure the change is driven by genuine vocation and not just a reaction to the opposite ("Pendulum Effect").

validation.completeAllSections: Please complete all sections before saving
validation.completeParentsInfo: Please complete at least your parents' basic information
